mapper.update: update production_reporting set report_code = #{reportCode}, type_id = #{typeId}, task_code = #{taskCode}, station_name = #{stationName}, process_name = #{processName}, production_order_code = #{productionOrderCode}, material_code = #{materialCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, status = #{status}, report_num = #{reportNum}, create_time = #{createTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, review_by = #{reviewBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_by = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}
update production_reporting set production_reporting.delete_flag=1 WHERE production_reporting.id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from production_reporting where production_reporting.delete_flag!=1 and production_reporting.id=#{id}
mapper.update: update production_reporting set production_reporting.status=40 WHERE production_reporting.delete_flag!=1 and production_reporting.id=#{id}
update production_reporting set production_reporting.status=41 WHERE production_reporting.delete_flag!=1 and production_reporting.id=#{id}
update production_reporting set production_reporting.status=39 WHERE production_reporting.delete_flag!=1 and production_reporting.id=#{id}
